name: Ranch Loop

movements.notes: approx. 6 miles: the ~3-mile varied-terrain loop run out, then reversed and run back

source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2020/12 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; originally announced as a single ~3-mile loop, but athletes were told on the day to turn around and run the course in reverse, doubling its length
